financialOpsBots.approvalModel: human-gated for any treasury or withdrawal execution

bots.name: Pre-Error Remediation Bot
bots.role: Detect early failures, malformed configs, syntax drift, and low-risk workflow regressions before they become blocking incidents.

bots.name: Withdrawal Placement Scanner
bots.role: Track withdrawal paths, payout logic, capital-allocation opportunities, and financial automation gaps across the repository.

bots.name: Success Documentation Reporter
bots.role: Convert successful scans and fixes into markdown reports, dashboard payloads, and operator-ready documentation.
